purpose: Recovered Mermaid authoring sources for rendered CAST-safe diagram figures.

识别 mode = discuss / plan / write"] RT --> MD{mode} MD -->|discuss| D1["优先 queryFacts spec/21
直查 SQL 命中即答"] D1 --> D2["未命中 fallback 自由 LLM
RAG 设定 read-only 无落盘"] MD -->|plan| P1["Writer 生成主修改
in-memory proposal-only 不落盘"] P1 --> P2["Validator analyzeImpact spec/19

+ SQL 影响半径 + LLM filter

半径严格收缩"] P2c --> P2d["终止: 候选空 / 半径不收缩 / 深度=3"] P2d --> P3["汇总 ChangeSet

勾选 + 编辑 + 一键同意/部分同意/拒绝"] P4 -->|approve| P5["后端 transaction 一次写所有 accepted 文件"] P5 --> P6["副作用
差量 anchor reindex + 知识图谱表 upsert
+ snapshot + history group"] P6 --> P7["Reflector 按 cascade 链路批次合并入队"] MD -->|write| W1["Writer Context Builder spec/23 装配:
assembleContext spec/20 — entity 状态 + 活跃关系
+ 待处理伏笔 + 最近章节 + 语义相关 + 世界观 + 概念约束
+ 守则相关 spec/25 — cardinal-rules.json + active critical promises
+ character value_axes + milestone cadence + rolling pacing metrics + isGoldenChapter"] W1 --> W2["生成章节
in-memory proposal-only 自然语言流式"] W2 --> W3["并行检测 各走 JSON mode spec/24"] W3 --> W3a["Checker Flash
风格审 + BeatAnalyzer + 守则 1/3/5"] W3 --> W3b["Validator Pro
一致性审 + ArcTracker + analyzeImpact + 守则 2/4"] W3 --> W3c["ReaderPanel Flash x5
5 persona 仿真 + 守则 1-5 综合二审
ChapterRiskReport"] W3a --> W4["汇总 ChangeSet 章节正文 + cascade 修改

blocking violation 已过 deadline 完全禁用 approve"] W5 --> W6["用户决议
后端 transaction 一次写

plan/02-multi-agent.html:
flowchart TD U([用户输入]) --> ROUT["Router callJsonAgent 单次
输入: user_input + queue snapshot
输出: actions=[writeSetting, ...]"] ROUT --> CC[cascade 控制器顺序执行 actions] CC --> W1[Writer 生成 worldview.md draft
in-memory 未落盘] W1 --> AI["analyzeImpact 内部递归 spec/19 ≤3 轮
SQL 影响半径 + LLM filter + Writer 内部短调用
全在内存, 不弹卡"] AI --> CS[汇总 ChangeSet
主修改 + cascade 1-3 级] CS --> AC["ApprovalCard 一次呈现整批
影响图谱 + 勾选 + 编辑"] AC -->|用户同意勾选项| RES["POST /api/approvals/id/resolve
transaction 一次写所有 accepted"] RES --> NEXT{cascade 控制器: 还有 action?} NEXT -->|是| CC NEXT -->|否| DONE["user_turns.status='done'"] DONE --> RFL[Reflector per-turn 入队
输入: user_input + actions + 所有 approvals] AC -.用户点 取消本次对话.-> CANCEL["rollbackTurn 逆序 revert
user_turns.status='cancelled'
Reflector 不跑"]

flowchart TD U([用户输入]) --> ROUT["Router callJsonAgent 单次
输出: actions=[writeChapter, ...]"] ROUT --> CC[cascade 控制器派发 Writer] CC --> W1[Writer 读 settings/* + outline + 历史章节
经 spec/23 context builder 装配] W1 --> W2[Writer 流式生成正文 逐段 emit
主 thread 应用层 memory] W2 -. 并行 callJsonAgent .-> C[Checker 风格审 + BeatAnalyzer] W2 -. 并行 callJsonAgent .-> V[Validator 一致性审 + ArcTracker + analyzeImpact] W2 -. 并行 callJsonAgent .-> RP[ReaderPanel 5 persona → ChapterRiskReport] C --> AGG[汇总 ChangeSet + CardinalRulesReport] V --> AGG RP --> AGG AGG --> DOOM{doom-loop 检测
spec/06 §相似度 ≥0.9} DOOM -->|escalate| ESC[ApprovalCard 顶部警告条
用户人工裁定] DOOM -->|continue| AC["ApprovalCard 一次呈现
章节 + 叙事报告 + 风险 + cascade"] AC -->|用户同意| RES["POST /api/approvals/id/resolve
落盘 + reindex"] RES --> NEXT{cascade 控制器: 还有 action?} NEXT -->|是| CC NEXT -->|否| DONE["user_turns.status='done'"] DONE --> RFL[Reflector per-turn 入队]

flowchart TD U([用户在 plan 模式发起意图]) --> W1[Writer 出主修改 in-memory] W1 --> LOOP["内部递归循环
用户不可见 无任何落盘"] LOOP --> R1["第 1 轮 analyzeImpact 基于 main delta
ChangeProposal 1"] R1 --> RA["Writer 内部对 needsChange=true 项
生成 afterText 内存"] RA --> R2["第 2 轮 analyzeImpact 基于第 1 轮 afterText
ChangeProposal 2"] R2 --> RN["... 1-3 轮 半径单调下降
weight 阈值递增 spec/19"] RN --> END["递归终止"] END --> CS["汇总 ChangeSet
主修改 + 所有 cascade proposal 含二级"] CS --> AC["一次 ApprovalCard 呈现整批

全选 / 全不选 / 一键同意勾选项 / 手动编辑某条 / 拒绝全部"] AC --> US["用户决定
POST /api/approvals/{id}/resolve
decision + accepted_items"] US ==> DISK([此处才开始落盘])
plan/05-modes-and-approval.html:
stateDiagram-v2 [*] --> idle idle --> classifying: input classifying --> discuss: Router 输出 actions[]
+ mode 一致性 (spec/24) classifying --> plan: 同上 classifying --> write: 同上 discuss: discuss (read-only) discuss --> idle state plan { [*] --> plan_generate plan_generate --> plan_validate plan_validate --> plan_diff plan_diff --> plan_await: await_approval plan_await --> [*]: approve
persist + reflect plan_await --> plan_generate: reject + feedback
refine } state write { [*] --> write_generate write_generate --> write_validate write_validate --> write_diff write_diff --> write_await: await_approval write_await --> [*]: approve
persist + reflect write_await --> write_generate: reject + feedback
refine } plan --> idle write --> idle

flowchart TD U([用户发起修改意图

in-memory 未落盘] W0 --> LOOP{{内部递归循环

entity_refs/concept_refs (w=100)
关系上下游 1 跳 (w=50-90)
dependencies 锚点 (w=70)
timeline 区间 (w=80)
embeddings topK (w=cos×100)"] S2 --> S3["step 3: filterByLLM

对每条 needsChange=true 生成 afterText
内存未落盘] WS --> R2["第 2 轮 analyzeImpact
基于 afterText 新 delta
SQL 半径严格收缩 (阈值 30 60)"] R2 --> R3["第 3 轮 若仍有候选
weight 阈值 60 90"] R3 --> TERM{终止条件
候选空 / 半径不收缩 / 深度=3} TERM --> SET[汇总 ChangeSet
主修改 + 所有 cascade proposal 含二级] SET --> AC["一次 ApprovalCard 呈现整批

每条 proposal 一行 diff 默认展开
每条 proposal 勾选框 默认勾
全选 / 全不选 / 一键同意 / 手动编辑 / 拒绝全部"] AC --> DEC["用户决定
POST /api/approvals/{id}/resolve"] DEC --> TX[后端 transaction
一次写所有 accepted 文件 主+cascade] TX --> SIDE[触发副作用
差量 reindex / snapshot / history group / Reflector 入队]

(geography / history / politics / rules / ...)"] A4["[阵营/组织]"] --> AT4["settings/factions/*, organizations/*"] A5["[地点]"] --> AT5["settings/locations/{regions,cities,buildings,landmarks}/*"] A6["[道具/事件]"] --> AT6["settings/items/*, events/*"] A7["[时间线/弧线]"] --> AT7["settings/timeline/*, chapter-arcs/*"] A8["[关系/伏笔]"] --> AT8["settings/relationships/*, foreshadowing/*, story-lines/*"] A9["[章节]"] --> AT9["chapters/*"] A10["[查询面板]"] --> AT10["queryFacts

sequenceDiagram participant U as User participant R as Router (Flash) participant W as Writer (Pro) participant V as Validator (Pro) participant FS as 文件 / 设定 Note over R: [12:30:45] U->>R: plan 模式 请求修改主角性别 R->>R: 分析: 用户意图
决策: 委派 Writer + Validator (并行) par 并行分发 R->>W: 委派 (Pro) and R->>V: 委派 (Pro) end Note over W: [12:30:46] W->>FS: readSetting('characters/lin.md') FS-->>W: 返回 1234 字 W->>W: 生成 diff (流式 3 段) W->>U: writeSetting (需审批) Note over W: 等待用户审批 Note over V: [12:30:47] V->>FS: 扫描 outline.md FS-->>V: 发现 3 处性别引用冲突 V->>FS: 扫描 chapters/* FS-->>V: 发现 5 处冲突 V-->>U: cascadeChanges (8)

flowchart TB
  subgraph CARD["章节风险报告"]
    direction TB
    HEAD["整体留存预测: 68/100  (推荐: minor-tweak)"]:::head
    subgraph RISK["多人标记的风险"]
      direction TB
      R1["'AI 味' (2/5 标) - 第 3 段长句过密"]
      R2["'节奏拖' (3/5 标) - 第 5-7 段铺垫过长"]
    end
    subgraph WIN["多人标记的亮点"]
      direction TB
      W1["'钩子强' (5/5 标) - 章末悬念到位"]

    end

plan/11-knowledge-graph.html:
flowchart BT subgraph L1["L1 数据层 (Schema, 见 spec/16)"] direction TB L1A["entity_relations
双向语义关系: 师徒/敌友/上下级/..."] L1B["entity_timeline
随章节变化的属性: age/location/..."] L1C["concepts + concept_refs
worldview 硬规则当 pseudo-entity"] L1D["dependencies
foreshadowing / callback / 跨文件锚定"] L1E["paragraph_anchors (段级稳定 ID)"] L1F["paragraph_embeddings (sqlite-vec vec0 virtual table)"] L1G["character.md frontmatter
initial_state/relations/reader_promises/taboos/value_axes"] end subgraph L2["L2 算法层 (Index Pipeline, 见 spec/17-19)"] direction TB L2A["段级稳定 ID (paragraph anchors)"] L2B["段级 embedding (sqlite-vec MATCH 语义检索)"] L2C["概念抽取 (LLM 跑 worldview/rules concepts 表)"] L2D["影响半径计算器 (纯 SQL 出候选, 不调 LLM)"] L2E["差量 reindex (只重算 dirty 段)"] end subgraph L3["L3 工具层 (Agent 接入, 见 spec/19-21)"] direction TB L3A["assembleContext
Writer 写章节前调, 自动 retrieve"] L3B["analyzeImpact
Validator 收 setting diff 后调"] L3C["queryFacts
作者主动查 / Router 转发"] end subgraph L4["L4 治理层 (Workflow)"] direction TB L4A["Plan inconsistency lock
有未决 cascade 时禁 write"] L4B["Setting Lint
孤儿 entity / 循环 relation / 失效锚点"] L4C["Snapshot (重大设定改动自动备份)"] L4D["派生文件守卫
派生视图只读 + reindex 覆盖警告"] end L1 --> L2 --> L3 --> L4

flowchart TD N1[writeSetting] --> N2[analyzeImpact spec/19] N2 --> N3["step 1: LLM 抽 semantic delta
lin.gender: male -- female"] N3 --> N4["step 2: 纯 SQL 查影响半径
entity_refs ∪ relations 上下游
∪ events 参与 ∪ concept_refs ∪ dependencies
∪ paragraph_embeddings (sqlite-vec MATCH topK)"] N4 --> N5["step 3: LLM 二次过滤
逐段判是否真受影响 + 给修改建议"] N5 --> N6["step 4: 输出 ChangeProposal 数组
+ 影响图谱 (UI 用)"] N6 --> N7[用户审] N7 --> N8[接受] N8 --> N9[Writer 重写] N9 -. 单层递归 防止环 .-> N2

flowchart TD N1[Writer 接到 chapterId + outline] --> N2[调 assembleContext spec/20] N2 --> S1["step 1: 从 outline NER 抽出涉及的 entities"] S1 --> S2["step 2: timeline.snapshotAt(entity, chapterId)
取角色到本章的最新状态"] S2 --> S3["step 3: relations.activeAt(entities, chapterId)
取本章时间点活跃关系"] S3 --> S4["step 4: dependencies.pendingFor(chapterId)
取本章应当回收/埋设的伏笔"] S4 --> S5["step 5: embeddings.search(outline, topK=5)
sqlite-vec MATCH 语义相关历史段"] S5 --> S6["step 6: 装齐 context block
(1M ctx 不裁剪)"] S6 --> N3[喂回 Writer prompt]

flowchart LR QF["queryFacts 工具 (spec/21)"] QF --> Q1["林川 ch_50 时多大
entity-at 查询 直查 timeline 表"] QF --> Q2["林川和王小芳关系演变
relations-of 查询 时间排序输出"] QF --> Q3["林川对女上司说过什么类似台词
semantic-search sqlite-vec 检索"] QF --> Q4["ch_005 之前提到过怀表的所有段落
mentions-of 查询 + 范围过滤"] UI["UI 查询面板 (Cmd+K query-facts 模式)
直接出结果, 不走 LLM"] RT["Router 在 discuss 模式自动调 queryFacts
事实查询 / 自由对话 分开"]
plan/12-memory-and-context.html:
flowchart BT subgraph L1["L1. 工作记忆 (Working Memory) — 单 turn 内装配后 prompt"] direction TB L1A["规模: 当前 stream 的 system + retrieve + messages + user"] L1B["位置: 内存 (装配后送入 LLM)"] L1C["访问: 由各 agent context builder 装配 (spec/23)"] L1D["生命周期: 单次 generateText/streamText 调用"] L1E["详见: spec/23 per-agent 上下文契约"] end subgraph L2["L2. 会话记忆 (Session Memory) — 应用层 memory 模块"] direction TB L2A["规模: 单 session 内对话历史 + tool calls"] L2B["位置: runtime.db messages 表 (跨项目共享文件, resource 隔离)"] L2C["访问: context builder 显式 fetchRecent(threadId, limit)"] L2D["生命周期: 单 session (默认 30 天不活动 GC)"] L2E["可选压缩: 长 session 200+ messages 启用, 默认关"] L2F["详见: spec/22 §应用层 memory 模块"] end subgraph L3["L3. 项目记忆 (Project Memory) — Reflector 沉淀的经验"] direction TB L3A["规模: ≤数百条 learnings (Reflector per-turn 写入, 见 plan/06)"] L3B["位置: index.db learnings 表"] L3C["访问: 各 agent context builder 注入 system prompt"] L3D["生命周期: 跨 session 永久 (30 天不命中自然衰减,简化版无 archive)"] L3E["详见: plan/06 + spec/22"] end subgraph L4["L4. 知识图谱 (Knowledge Graph) — 一致性的事实源"] direction TB L4A["规模: 全项目设定 + 章节 + 段锚 + entity_relations
+ 概念 + foreshadowings + cardinal-rules.json"] L4B["位置: file (md) + index.db"] L4C["访问: assembleContext 写 / queryFacts 读 / analyzeImpact"] L4D["生命周期: 永久 (项目存在则存在)"] L4E["详见: plan/11 + spec/16-21 + spec/25"] end L1 -. "append + lastMessages 滑窗" .-> L2 L2 -. "inject top-K by scope (按 agent 适用)" .-> L3 L3 -. "per-agent 契约 retrieve (按职责)" .-> L4

flowchart TD A([user_turns.status='done']) --> B[入队 Reflector
turn 级批次 per-turn] B --> C[Reflector 出队] C --> D[提炼 1-3 条 learnings
走 JSON mode, spec/24] D --> E[upsert 到 learnings 表] E --> F["各 agent context builder (spec/23)"] F --> G["取 learnings WHERE project_id=X
AND scope IN 该 agent 适用
AND weight ≥ 0.2"] G --> H["ORDER BY weight DESC LIMIT 8"] H --> I["cardinal_rule scope 的 top-1 永远保留
(override 截断)"] I --> J[注入 system prompt 的'经验'段] J --> K[Agent 用经验 + L4 数据生成] K --> L[用户审批] L --> M[闭环] M --> N[后台 cron 跑 weight 衰减] N --> O["weight ×0.95 / 30 天
weight < 0.2 软过滤(不注入但保留行)
cardinal_rule scope 不衰减"] O -. 下一轮 .-> A

spec/06-approval-flow.html:
sequenceDiagram participant A as Agent participant S as Server participant C as Client A->>S: writeSettingProposal returns { kind: "proposal" } S->>C: SSE: tool-call-needs-approval Note over C: onToolCall 拦截
渲染 ApprovalCard Note over C: 用户点 "同意" C->>S: POST /api/approvals/{id}/resolve S->>S: SQLite transaction 写 accepted_items S->>C: { ok: true } Note over S: cascade controller 推进下一 action 或结束 turn

status='reviewing'"] CAND --> PANEL["SettingsDialog, 概念审视面板

spec/17-paragraph-anchors.html:
flowchart TD SAVE([writeSetting / writeChapter 落盘]) --> W[reindex Worker 取该 file] W --> OLD["读旧的 paragraph_anchors
WHERE file_path = X AND deleted_at IS NULL"] OLD --> SPLIT["按 splitParagraphs(新内容) 算新段集"] SPLIT --> DIFF[diff 算法判 5 类] DIFF --> U[unchanged: anchor 不变] DIFF --> M["modified: 内容微调
(signature 同, content_hash 不同)"] DIFF --> D[deleted: 旧的找不到对应] DIFF --> A[added: 新内容无对应旧 anchor] DIFF --> R["rewritten: 旧失效 + 邻接相同
+ 新位置内容近似"] U --> APPLY[对各类做对应处理] M --> APPLY D --> APPLY A --> APPLY R --> APPLY APPLY --> BC["广播 'anchors:changed' 事件"] BC --> DS["下游各自处理:
entity_refs / concept_refs
embeddings / dependencies"]
spec/18-embeddings.html:
flowchart TD EVT{anchor 事件} EVT -->|unchanged| U[embedding 不动] EVT -->|modified| M["enqueueParagraphRescan"] M --> M2[reembedAnchor] EVT -->|rewritten| RW1["旧 anchor 软删"] RW1 --> RW2["CASCADE 删 paragraph_embeddings 行
(FK ON DELETE CASCADE)"] RW2 --> RW3[新 anchor] RW3 --> RW4[reembedAnchor] EVT -->|deleted| DEL["软删 anchor
embedding 一并 cascade 删"] EVT -->|added| ADD[reembedAnchor]
spec/19-impact-analysis.html:
flowchart TD W0([Writer agent 出主修改 in-memory]) --> V[Validator agent execute
调 analyzeImpact 工具,传入 main delta] V --> LOOP["analyzeImpact 内部递归循环"] subgraph R1["第 1 轮 (round=1, weightFloor=30)"] direction TB R1S1["step 1: extractSemanticDelta(main delta)
LLM Flash 抽结构化 delta
(entity-attribute / relation-add / concept-add / paragraph-rewrite ...)"] R1S2["step 2: computeImpactRadius — 纯 SQL 出候选段集 (weight ≥ 30)
entity_refs / concept_refs (weight=100)
关系上下游 1 跳 (weight=50-90)
dependencies 锚点上下游 (weight=70)
timeline 区间内引用 (weight=80)
embeddings 语义相关 topK (weight=cos×100)"] R1S3["step 3: filterByLLM — Pro 批 5 段
ChangeProposal[round=1]"] R1S1 --> R1S2 --> R1S3 end LOOP --> R1 R1 --> WS1["Writer 内部短调用
对每条 needsChange=true proposal 生成 afterText (in-memory)"] subgraph R2["第 2 轮 (round=2, weightFloor=60)"] direction TB R2S1["step 1: extractSemanticDelta(round=1 afterText 集合)"] R2S2["step 2: computeImpactRadius — 必须严格收缩
(候选 ⊆ 第 1 轮剩余)"] R2S3["step 3: filterByLLM, ChangeProposal[round=2]"] R2S1 --> R2S2 --> R2S3 end WS1 --> R2 R2 --> WS2[Writer 内部短调用 round=2 afterText] WS2 --> R3["第 3 轮 (round=3, weightFloor=90) 同上"] R3 --> TERM{"终止 — 任一成立即停:
a. 候选段集为空
b. 半径未严格收缩
c. round = 3"} TERM --> SUM["汇总 ChangeSet:
主修改 (cascadeLevel=0)
第 1 轮 ChangeProposal (cascadeLevel=1)
第 2 轮 ChangeProposal (cascadeLevel=2)
第 3 轮 ChangeProposal (cascadeLevel=3)
影响图谱 (节点 + 边,标 cascadeLevel)"] SUM --> RET[analyzeImpact 工具返回
Validator agent 提交给 ApprovalCard] RET --> AC["ApprovalCard 一次呈现整批
用户勾选 + 一键同意 / 部分同意 / 拒绝"] AC --> APR["用户 approve
POST /api/approvals/{id}/resolve"] APR --> COMMIT[后端 transaction
一次落盘所有 accepted 文件] COMMIT --> SIDE["落盘副作用
差量 reindex / snapshot
history group / Reflector"]

flowchart TD IN([analyzeImpact 工具入口
传入 main delta]) --> INIT["round = 1, weightFloor = 30"] INIT --> CIR["computeImpactRadius(weightFloor)
出候选"] CIR --> CHK1{候选空?} CHK1 -->|是| END([break]) CHK1 -->|否| FLT["filterByLLM(候选)
ChangeProposal[round]"] FLT --> CHK2{"needsChange=true
proposal 数 = 0?"} CHK2 -->|是 LLM 判全部不需改| END CHK2 -->|否| WSC["Writer 内部短调用
各 proposal 生成 afterText (in-memory)"] WSC --> INC["round += 1"] INC --> CHK3{"round > 3?"} CHK3 -->|是| END CHK3 -->|否| WF["weightFloor += 30
(30 / 60 / 90)"] WF --> NEXT["nextDelta = 把 afterText 集合
算成 paragraph-rewrite + concept-* delta"] NEXT --> CHK4{"半径不严格收缩?
(currSet 不是 prevSet 子集
或 |currSet| ≥ |prevSet|)"} CHK4 -->|是| END CHK4 -->|否| LOOP["delta = nextDelta
continue"] LOOP --> CIR
spec/20-context-assembly.html:
flowchart LR IN([Writer 接到任务
chapterId + outline + 用户 prompt]) --> CALL["调 assembleContext
chapterId, outline, includeKinds, tokenBudget"] CALL --> ASM subgraph ASM [装配 step 1-9] direction TB S1[step 1: 从 outline NER 抽 entity
AC trie + LLM 备用] S2[step 2: timeline.snapshotAt
角色到本章的最新状态] S3[step 3: relations.activeAt
本章时间点活跃关系] S4[step 4: dependencies.pendingFor
应当回收/埋设的伏笔] S5[step 5: previousChaptersOf
涉及角色的最近 K 个章节段] S6[step 6: embeddings.search
语义最相关历史段 topK=10] S7[step 7: relevantWorldview
涉及的世界观片段] S8["step 8: pickActiveConcepts
本章硬规则 absent/restricted/mandatory"] S9[step 9: tokenBudget allocator
按优先级分配预算] S1 --> S2 --> S3 --> S4 --> S5 --> S6 --> S7 --> S8 --> S9 end ASM --> OUT([返回 ContextBundle])

flowchart TD subgraph PANEL ["FactQueryPanel (Cmd+K 唤出)"] direction TB MODE["查询模式 (radio): 实体状态 | 关系 | 提及 | 语义搜索"] FORM["输入区
实体: 林川
章节: ch_050
属性: 全部"] BTN[/"[查询] 按钮"/] RESULT["结果区

spec/25-cardinal-rules.html:
flowchart TD subgraph CARD ["ApprovalCard (审批卡片)"] direction TB HEAD["Writer 想写第 23 章 (字数 4823)"] DIFF["Diff: ... (章节正文)"] subgraph RISK ["五大守则风险报告"] direction TB CRIT["critical (1)
人设崩坏: 林溪违反 reader_promise '杀伐果断'
段 ch_023#§5 瞻前顾后不忍下手
value_axis 对敌 实际 0.32 vs baseline 0.85 偏离 0.53 阈值 0.4"] MAJ["major (2)
节奏崩盘: 距上次 milestone (第 18 章 突破金丹) 已 5 章无新 milestone
期待感: critical promise '三年之约' 距 deadline 仅 7 章, 最近 5 章未触及"] WARN["warn (1)
金手指: 滚动 10 章系统奖励段比例 32% 阈值 30%"] CRIT --> MAJ --> WARN end CHECK{{"我已阅读上述风险, 明知违反仍通过
critical 必勾 checkbox"}} ACTION["[拒绝 + 反馈] [同意章节 (Y)]"] HEAD --> DIFF --> RISK --> CHECK --> ACTION end
spec/26-cascade-controller.html:
flowchart TD U([USER_INPUT]) --> C0["create user_turn
status=running,current_action_index=0"] C0 --> R["Router 一次性解析
actions[]"] R --> C1["persist actions snapshot
user_turns.actions_json"] C1 --> N{还有 action?} N -- no --> DONE["status=done"] N -- yes --> A["execute action[i]"] A -->|read-only| STEP["emit result + i++"] A -->|write| P["生成 proposal-only ChangeSet
调用 spec/19,写 approvals(status=pending)"] P --> WAIT["status=awaiting_approval
等待 /api/approvals/{id}/resolve"] WAIT -->|approved/rejected| STEP STEP --> N U2([cancelTurn]) --> ABORT["abort in-flight LLM / cascade task"] ABORT --> RV["rollback approved approvals
按 cascade_group_id 倒序"] RV --> CAN["status=cancelled 或 cancel_failed"]
